topic.title: How to Change the Headings depending on the Language

indexterm.product: author developer editor authorEclipse developerEclipse editorEclipse

section.title: Example 1: Adjust the headings according to the publication’s language
section.p: It is possible to customize the text displayed in the headings depending on the language of the publication (set by the xml:lang attribute on the main ditamap).

section.title: Example 2: Adjust the headings according to each topic language
section.p: It is possible to customize the heading text depending on the language of each topic as well (using the xml:lang attribute)..
